introSection: Zooom! is a steel suspended kiddie roller coaster at Flamingo Land in Malton, North Yorkshire, England, UK.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Zooom! is the first custom Zamperla Air Force installation. The cars swing slightly around the corners.

fullText:
Zooom! is a steel suspended kiddie roller coaster at Flamingo Land in Malton, North Yorkshire, England, UK.

Zooom! is the first custom Zamperla Air Force installation. The cars swing slightly around the corners.
